sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija je stara i lijepa umjetnost.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is an old and beautiful art.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطَّالِبُ كَيْفَ يَكْتُبُ الحُرُوفَ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Student uči kako pravilno pisati slova.
sentences.translationEn: The student learns how to write letters correctly.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى قَلَمٍ خَاصٍّ وَوَرَقٍ جَيِّدٍ.
sentences.translation: Treba mu posebna olovka i dobar papir.
sentences.translationEn: He needs a special pen and good paper.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَرَّنُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ حَتَّى يُتْقِنَ الخَطَّ.
sentences.translation: Vježba svaki dan dok ne savlada kaligrafiju.
sentences.translationEn: He practices every day until he masters calligraphy.
